texto: Has modern society lost a measure of its spiritual awareness because we take so little time to walk? In not allowing ourselves time to slow down, to be close to the earth around us, have we become impervious to a God who chooses to reveal Himself through His creation?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de amy litzelman que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Has modern society lost a measure of its spiritual awareness because we take so little time to wa…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, contemplation, walking, com foco em walking e wonder.

texto: Jesus lived a life of deep meditation. If thoughts and words were physical objects, meditation would be the act of holding, examining, taking apart, tasting, smelling, listening to, and savoring in order to study and become one.
explicacao: Citação de amy litzelman sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Jesus lived a life of deep meditation.
